title: cyclosorus oblongus
intro: Cyclosorus oblongus, also known as the oblongus fern, is a type of plant belonging to the family Thelypteridaceae, characterized by its oval-shaped fronds and distinctive leaflets. Traditionally, Cyclosorus oblongus has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which are said to include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever and alleviating respiratory issues, making it a sought-after remedy in traditional folk medicine. Cyclosorus oblongus can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and dried extracts, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties.
